summary: The diff shows modifications to frontend-file-summaries.txt and project_state.json, but critically does not include any changes to the primary target file frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts. REQ-1 requires updating useActor.ts to use authenticated identity from authClient.getIdentity(), but no such change is present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the useActor hook (frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts) to create the backend actor using the authenticated identity retrieved from authClient.getIdentity() instead of an anonymous identity, rebuilt whenever authentication state changes.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not contain any modification to frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts. The file is not listed in modified, added, or removed files. None of the acceptance criteria (using authClient.getIdentity(), re-creating actor on auth state changes, reading authClient from InternetIdentity context, graceful fallback) can be verified as implemented.
